agentFindings: The website https://vibhorfoods.com was investigated for brand abuse. I browsed the homepage, clicked on navigation items to reach a product listing page, and then a specific product page for Refined Soyabean Oil. I also inspected the footer for contact information and checked for login/signup pages. No evidence of impersonation or brand abuse of Flipkart, Flipkart Minutes, Cleartrip, or Myntra was found. The site consistently displayed 'Vibhor Foods' branding and products.
